Name: Stench
Description: By releasing a stench when attacking, the Pokemon may cause the target to flinch.

Name: Drizzle
Description: The Pokemon makes it rain when it enters a battle.

Name: Speed Boost
Description: The Pokemon's Speed stat is boosted every turn.

Name: Battle Armor
Description: Hard armor protects the Pokemon from critical hits.

Name: Sturdy
Description: The Pokemon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

Name: Damp
Description: The Pokemon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokemon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.

Name: Limber
Description: The Pokemon's limber body prevents it from being paralyzed.

Name: Sand Veil
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's evasiveness in a sandstorm.

Name: Static
Description: The Pokemon is charged with static electricity and may paralyze attackers that make direct contact with it.

Name: Volt Absorb
Description: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokemon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

Name: Water Absorb
Description: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokemon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

Name: Oblivious
Description: The Pokemon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

Name: Cloud Nine
Description: Eliminates the effects of weather.

Name: Compound Eyes
Description: The Pokemon's compound eyes boost its accuracy.

Name: Insomnia
Description: The Pokemon's insomnia prevents it from falling asleep.

Name: Color Change
Description: The Pokemon's type becomes the type of the move used on it.

Name: Immunity
Description: The Pokemon's immune system prevents it from being poisoned.

Name: Flash Fire
Description: If hit by a Fire-type move, the Pokemon absorbs the flames and uses them to power up its own Fire-type moves.

Name: Shield Dust
Description: Protective dust shields the Pokemon from the additional effects of moves.

Name: Own Tempo
Description: The Pokemon sticks to its own tempo, preventing it from becoming confused or being affected by Intimidate.

Name: Suction Cups
Description: The Pokemon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.

Name: Intimidate
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokemon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

Name: Shadow Tag
Description: The Pokemon steps on the opposing Pokemon's shadows to prevent them from fleeing or switching out.

Name: Rough Skin
Description: The Pokemon's rough skin damages attackers that make direct contact with it.

Name: Wonder Guard
Description: Its mysterious power only lets supereffective moves hit the Pokemon.

Name: Levitate
Description: By floating in the air, the Pokemon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

Name: Effect Spore
Description: Contact with the Pokemon may inflict poison, sleep, or paralysis on the attacker.

Name: Synchronize
Description: If the Pokemon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokemon, that Pokemon will be inflicted with the same status condition.

Name: Clear Body
Description: Prevents other Pokemon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokemon's stats.

Name: Natural Cure
Description: The Pokemon's status conditions are cured when it switches out.

Name: Lightning Rod
Description: The Pokemon draws in all Electric-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted.

Name: Serene Grace
Description: Raises the likelihood of additional effects occurring when the Pokemon uses its moves.

Name: Swift Swim
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat in rain.

Name: Chlorophyll
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

Name: Illuminate
Description: By illuminating its surroundings, the Pokemon prevents its accuracy from being lowered.

Name: Trace
Description: When it enters a battle, the Pokemon copies an opposing Pokemon's Ability.

Name: Huge Power
Description: Doubles the Pokemon's Attack stat.

Name: Poison Point
Description: Contact with the Pokemon may poison the attacker.

Name: Inner Focus
Description: The Pokemon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

Name: Magma Armor
Description: The Pokemon's hot magma coating prevents it from being frozen.

Name: Water Veil
Description: The Pokemon's water veil prevents it from being burned.

Name: Magnet Pull
Description: Prevents Steel-type Pokemon from fleeing by pulling them in with magnetism.

Name: Soundproof
Description: Soundproofing gives the Pokemon full immunity to all sound-based moves.

Name: Rain Dish
Description: The Pokemon gradually regains HP in rain.

Name: Sand Stream
Description: The Pokemon summons a sandstorm when it enters a battle.

Name: Pressure
Description: Puts other Pokemon under pressure, causing them to expend more PP to use their moves.

Name: Thick Fat
Description: The Pokemon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

Name: Early Bird
Description: The Pokemon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokemon.

Name: Flame Body
Description: Contact with the Pokemon may burn the attacker.

Name: Run Away
Description: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokemon.

Name: Keen Eye
Description: The Pokemon's keen eyes prevent its accuracy from being lowered. It also ignores the target's stages in evasion.

Name: Hyper Cutter
Description: The Pokemon's prized, mighty pincers prevent other Pokemon from lowering its Attack stat.

Name: Pickup
Description: The Pokemon may pick up an item another Pokemon used during a battle. It may pick up items outside of battle, too.

Name: Truant
Description: Each time the Pokemon uses a move, it spends the next turn loafing around.

Name: Hustle
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat but lowers its accuracy.

Name: Cute Charm
Description: The Pokemon may infatuate attackers that make direct contact with it.

Name: Plus
Description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat of the Pokemon if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

Name: Minus
Description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat of the Pokemon if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

Name: Forecast
Description: The Pokemon transforms with the weather to change its type to Water, Fire, or Ice.

Name: Sticky Hold
Description: The Pokemon's held items cling to its sticky body and cannot be removed by other Pokemon.

Name: Shed Skin
Description: The Pokemon may cure its own status conditions by shedding its skin.

Name: Guts
Description: It's so gutsy that having a status condition boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat.

Name: Marvel Scale
Description: The Pokemon's marvelous scales boost its Defense stat if it has a status condition.

Name: Liquid Ooze
Description: The strong stench of the Pokemon's oozed liquid damages attackers that use HP-draining moves.

Name: Overgrow
Description: Powers up Grass-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

Name: Blaze
Description: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

Name: Torrent
Description: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

Name: Swarm
Description: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

Name: Rock Head
Description: Protects the Pokemon from recoil damage.

Name: Drought
Description: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokemon enters a battle.

Name: Arena Trap
Description: Prevents opposing Pokemon from fleeing from battle.

Name: Vital Spirit
Description: The Pokemon is full of vitality, and that prevents it from falling asleep.

Name: White Smoke
Description: The Pokemon is protected by its white smoke, which prevents other Pokemon from lowering its stats.

Name: Pure Power
Description: Using its pure power, the Pokemon doubles its Attack stat.

Name: Shell Armor
Description: A hard shell protects the Pokemon from critical hits.

Name: Air Lock
Description: Eliminates the effects of weather.

Name: Tangled Feet
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's evasiveness if it is confused.

Name: Motor Drive
Description: The Pokemon takes no damage when hit by Electric-type moves. Instead, its Speed stat is boosted.

Name: Rivalry
Description: The Pokemon's competitive spirit makes it deal more damage to Pokemon of the same gender, but less damage to Pokemon of the opposite gender.

Name: Steadfast
Description: The Pokemon's determination boosts its Speed stat every time it flinches.

Name: Snow Cloak
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's evasiveness in snow.

Name: Gluttony
Description: If the Pokemon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.

Name: Anger Point
Description: The Pokemon is angered when it takes a critical hit, and that maxes its Attack stat.

Name: Unburden
Description: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokemon's held item is used or lost.

Name: Heatproof
Description: The Pokemon's heatproof body halves the damage taken from Fire-type moves.

Name: Simple
Description: Doubles the effects of the Pokemon's stat changes.

Name: Dry Skin
Description: Restores the Pokemon's HP in rain or when it is hit by Water-type moves. Reduces HP in harsh sunlight, and increases the damage received from Fire-type moves.

Name: Download
Description: The Pokemon compares an opposing Pokemon's Defense and Sp. Def stats before raising its own Attack or Sp. Atk stat — whichever will be more effective.

Name: Iron Fist
Description: Powers up punching moves.

Name: Poison Heal
Description: If poisoned, the Pokemon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

Name: Adaptability
Description: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokemon.

Name: Skill Link
Description: Maximizes the number of times multistrike moves hit.

Name: Hydration
Description: Cures the Pokemon's status conditions in rain.

Name: Solar Power
Description: In harsh sunlight, the Pokemon's Sp. Atk stat is boosted, but its HP decreases every turn.

Name: Quick Feet
Description: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokemon has a status condition.

Name: Normalize
Description: All the Pokemon's moves become Normal type. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

Name: Sniper
Description: If the Pokemon's attack lands a critical hit, the attack is powered up even further.

Name: Magic Guard
Description: The Pokemon only takes damage from attacks.

Name: No Guard
Description: The Pokemon employs no-guard tactics to ensure incoming and outgoing attacks always land.

Name: Stall
Description: The Pokemon is always the last to use its moves.

Name: Technician
Description: Powers up weak moves so the Pokemon can deal more damage with them.

Name: Leaf Guard
Description: Prevents status conditions in harsh sunlight.

Name: Klutz
Description: The Pokemon can't use any held items.

Name: Mold Breaker
Description: The Pokemon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

Name: Super Luck
Description: The Pokemon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted.

Name: Aftermath
Description: Damages the attacker if it knocks out the Pokemon with a move that makes direct contact.

Name: Anticipation
Description: The Pokemon can sense an opposing Pokemon's dangerous moves.

Name: Forewarn
Description: When it enters a battle, the Pokemon can tell one of the moves an opposing Pokemon has.

Name: Unaware
Description: When attacking, the Pokemon ignores the target's stat changes.

Name: Tinted Lens
Description: The Pokemon can use "not very effective" moves to deal regular damage.

Name: Filter
Description: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokemon.

Name: Slow Start
Description: For five turns, the Pokemon's Attack and Speed stats are halved.

Name: Scrappy
Description: The Pokemon can hit Ghost-type Pokemon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.

Name: Storm Drain
Description: The Pokemon draws in all Water-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted.

Name: Ice Body
Description: The Pokemon gradually regains HP in snow.

Name: Solid Rock
Description: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokemon.

Name: Snow Warning
Description: The Pokemon makes it snow when it enters a battle.

Name: Honey Gather
Description: The Pokemon may gather Honey after a battle.

Name: Frisk
Description: When it enters a battle, the Pokemon can check an opposing Pokemon's held item.

Name: Reckless
Description: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

Name: Multitype
Description: Changes the Pokemon's type to match the plate it holds.

Name: Flower Gift
Description: Boosts the Attack and Sp. Def stats of the Pokemon and its allies in harsh sunlight.

Name: Bad Dreams
Description: Damages opposing Pokemon that are asleep.

Name: Pickpocket
Description: The Pokemon steals the held item from attackers that make direct contact with it.

Name: Sheer Force
Description: Removes any additional effects from the Pokemon's moves, but increases the moves' power.

Name: Contrary
Description: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokemon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them — and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

Name: Unnerve
Description: Unnerves opposing Pokemon and makes them unable to eat Berries.

Name: Defiant
Description: If the Pokemon has any stat lowered by an opposing Pokemon, its Attack stat will be boosted sharply.

Name: Defeatist
Description: Halves the Pokemon's Attack and Sp. Atk stats when its HP drops to half or less.

Name: Cursed Body
Description: May disable a move that has dealt damage to the Pokemon.

Name: Healer
Description: Sometimes cures the status conditions of the Pokemon's allies.

Name: Friend Guard
Description: Reduces damage dealt to allies.

Name: Weak Armor
Description: The Pokemon's Defense stat is lowered when it takes damage from physical moves, but its Speed stat is sharply boosted.

Name: Heavy Metal
Description: Doubles the Pokemon's weight.

Name: Light Metal
Description: Halves the Pokemon's weight.

Name: Multiscale
Description: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokemon takes while its HP is full.

Name: Toxic Boost
Description: Powers up physical moves when the Pokemon is poisoned.

Name: Flare Boost
Description: Powers up special moves when the Pokemon is burned.

Name: Harvest
Description: May create another Berry after one is used.

Name: Telepathy
Description: The Pokemon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.

Name: Moody
Description: Every turn, one of the Pokemon's stats will be boosted sharply, but another stat will be lowered.

Name: Overcoat
Description: The Pokemon takes no damage from sandstorms. It is also protected from the effects of powders and spores.

Name: Poison Touch
Description: May poison a target when the Pokemon makes contact.

Name: Regenerator
Description: The Pokemon has a little of its HP restored when withdrawn from battle.

Name: Big Pecks
Description: Prevents the Pokemon from having its Defense stat lowered.

Name: Sand Rush
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat in a sandstorm.

Name: Wonder Skin
Description: Makes status moves more likely to miss the Pokemon.

Name: Analytic
Description: Boosts the power of the Pokemon's move if it is the last to act that turn.

Name: Illusion
Description: The Pokemon fools opponents by entering battle disguised as the last Pokemon in its Trainer's party.

Name: Imposter
Description: The Pokemon transforms itself into the Pokemon it's facing.

Name: Infiltrator
Description: The Pokemon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.

Name: Mummy
Description: Contact with the Pokemon changes the attacker's Ability to Mummy.

Name: Moxie
Description: When the Pokemon knocks out a target, it shows moxie, which boosts its Attack stat.

Name: Justified
Description: When the Pokemon is hit by a Dark-type attack, its Attack stat is boosted by its sense of justice.

Name: Rattled
Description: The Pokemon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

Name: Magic Bounce
Description: The Pokemon reflects status moves instead of getting hit by them.

Name: Sap Sipper
Description: The Pokemon takes no damage when hit by Grass-type moves. Instead, its Attack stat is boosted.

Name: Prankster
Description: Gives priority to the Pokemon's status moves.

Name: Sand Force
Description: Boosts the power of Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves in a sandstorm.

Name: Iron Barbs
Description: The Pokemon's iron barbs damage the attacker if it makes direct contact.

Name: Zen Mode
Description: Changes the Pokemon's shape when its HP drops to half or less.

Name: Victory Star
Description: Boosts the accuracy of the Pokemon and its allies.

Name: Turboblaze
Description: The Pokemon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

Name: Teravolt
Description: The Pokemon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

Name: Aroma Veil
Description: Protects the Pokemon and its allies from effects that prevent the use of moves.

Name: Flower Veil
Description: Ally Grass-type Pokemon are protected from status conditions and the lowering of their stats.

Name: Cheek Pouch
Description: The Pokemon's HP is restored when it eats any Berry, in addition to the Berry's usual effect.

Name: Protean
Description: Changes the Pokemon's type to the type of the move it's about to use. This works only once each time the Pokemon enters battle.

Name: Fur Coat
Description: Halves the damage taken from physical moves.

Name: Magician
Description: The Pokemon steals the held item from any target it hits with a move.

Name: Bulletproof
Description: Protects the Pokemon from ball and bomb moves.

Name: Competitive
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Sp. Atk stat sharply when its stats are lowered by an opposing Pokemon.

Name: Strong Jaw
Description: The Pokemon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.

Name: Refrigerate
Description: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

Name: Sweet Veil
Description: Prevents the Pokemon and its allies from falling asleep.

Name: Stance Change
Description: The Pokemon changes its form to Blade Forme when it uses an attack move and changes to Shield Forme when it uses King's Shield.

Name: Gale Wings
Description: Gives priority to the Pokemon's Flying-type moves while its HP is full.

Name: Mega Launcher
Description: Powers up pulse moves.

Name: Grass Pelt
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Defense stat on Grassy Terrain.

Name: Symbiosis
Description: The Pokemon passes its held item to an ally that has used up an item.

Name: Tough Claws
Description: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

Name: Pixilate
Description: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

Name: Gooey
Description: Contact with the Pokemon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.

Name: Aerilate
Description: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

Name: Parental Bond
Description: The parent and child attack one after the other.

Name: Dark Aura
Description: Powers up the Dark-type moves of all Pokemon on the field.

Name: Fairy Aura
Description: Powers up the Fairy-type moves of all Pokemon on the field.

Name: Aura Break
Description: The effects of "Aura" Abilities are reversed to lower the power of affected moves.

Name: Primordial Sea
Description: The Pokemon changes the weather to nullify Fire-type attacks.

Name: Desolate Land
Description: The Pokemon changes the weather to nullify Water-type attacks.

Name: Delta Stream
Description: The Pokemon changes the weather so that no moves are supereffective against the Flying type.

Name: Stamina
Description: Boosts the Defense stat when the Pokemon is hit by an attack.

Name: Wimp Out
Description: The Pokemon cowardly switches out when its HP drops to half or less.

Name: Emergency Exit
Description: The Pokemon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP drops to half or less.

Name: Water Compaction
Description: Boosts the Defense stat sharply when the Pokemon is hit by a Water-type move.

Name: Merciless
Description: The Pokemon's attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

Name: Shields Down
Description: When its HP drops to half or less, the Pokemon's shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

Name: Stakeout
Description: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.

Name: Water Bubble
Description: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves that hit the Pokemon and prevents it from being burned.

Name: Steelworker
Description: Powers up Steel-type moves.

Name: Berserk
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a hit that causes its HP to drop to half or less.

Name: Slush Rush
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat in snow.

Name: Long Reach
Description: The Pokemon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

Name: Liquid Voice
Description: Sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

Name: Triage
Description: Gives priority to the Pokemon's healing moves.

Name: Galvanize
Description: Normal-type moves become Electric-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

Name: Surge Surfer
Description: Doubles the Pokemon's Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

Name: Schooling
Description: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokemon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.

Name: Disguise
Description: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokemon can protect it from an attack at the cost of 12.5% of its HP.

Name: Battle Bond
Description: When the Pokemon knocks out a target, its bond with its Trainer is strengthened, and its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats are boosted.

Name: Power Construct
Description: Cells gather to aid the Pokemon when its HP drops to half or less, causing it to change into its Complete Forme.

Name: Corrosion
Description: The Pokemon can poison the target even if it's a Steel- or Poison-type.

Name: Comatose
Description: The Pokemon is always drowsing and will never wake up. It can attack while in its sleeping state.

Name: Queenly Majesty
Description: The Pokemon's majesty pressures opponents and makes them unable to use priority moves against the Pokemon or its allies.

Name: Innards Out
Description: When the Pokemon is knocked out, it damages its attacker by the amount equal to the HP it had left before it was hit.

Name: Dancer
Description: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokemon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.

Name: Battery
Description: Powers up ally Pokemon's special moves.

Name: Fluffy
Description: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

Name: Dazzling
Description: The Pokemon dazzles its opponents, making them unable to use priority moves against the Pokemon or its allies.

Name: Soul-Heart
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Sp. Atk stat every time another Pokemon faints.

Name: Tangling Hair
Description: Contact with the Pokemon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.

Name: Receiver
Description: The Pokemon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

Name: Power of Alchemy
Description: The Pokemon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

Name: Beast Boost
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's most proficient stat every time it knocks out a target.

Name: RKS System
Description: Changes the Pokemon's type to match the memory disc it holds.

Name: Electric Surge
Description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokemon enters a battle.

Name: Psychic Surge
Description: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokemon enters a battle.

Name: Misty Surge
Description: Turns the ground into Misty Terrain when the Pokemon enters a battle.

Name: Grassy Surge
Description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokemon enters a battle.

Name: Full Metal Body
Description: Prevents other Pokemon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokemon's stats.

Name: Shadow Shield
Description: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokemon takes while its HP is full.

Name: Prism Armor
Description: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokemon.

Name: Neuroforce
Description: Powers up the Pokemon's supereffective attacks even further.

Name: Intrepid Sword
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat when the Pokemon enters a battle for the first time.

Name: Dauntless Shield
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Defense stat when the Pokemon enters a battle for the first time.

Name: Libero
Description: Changes the Pokemon's type to the type of the move it's about to use. This works only once each time the Pokemon enters battle.

Name: Ball Fetch
Description: If the Pokemon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

Name: Cotton Down
Description: When the Pokemon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stats of all Pokemon except itself.

Name: Propeller Tail
Description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokemon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

Name: Mirror Armor
Description: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokemon receives.

Name: Gulp Missile
Description: When the Pokemon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

Name: Stalwart
Description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokemon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

Name: Steam Engine
Description: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokemon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

Name: Punk Rock
Description: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokemon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.

Name: Sand Spit
Description: The Pokemon creates a sandstorm when it's hit by an attack.

Name: Ice Scales
Description: The Pokemon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

Name: Ripen
Description: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

Name: Ice Face
Description: The Pokemon's ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokemon's appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.

Name: Power Spot
Description: Just being next to the Pokemon powers up moves.

Name: Mimicry
Description: Changes the Pokemon's type depending on the terrain.

Name: Screen Cleaner
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokemon.

Name: Steely Spirit
Description: Powers up the Steel-type moves of the Pokemon and its allies.

Name: Perish Body
Description: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokemon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

Name: Wandering Spirit
Description: The Pokemon exchanges Abilities with a Pokemon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

Name: Gorilla Tactics
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat, but only allows the use of the first selected move.

Name: Neutralizing Gas
Description: While the Pokemon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokemon's Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

Name: Pastel Veil
Description: Prevents the Pokemon and its allies from being poisoned.

Name: Hunger Switch
Description: The Pokemon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of every turn.

Name: Quick Draw
Description: Enables the Pokemon to move first occasionally.

Name: Unseen Fist
Description: If the Pokemon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

Name: Curious Medicine
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

Name: Transistor
Description: Powers up Electric-type moves.

Name: Dragon's Maw
Description: Powers up Dragon-type moves.

Name: Chilling Neigh
Description: When the Pokemon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

Name: Grim Neigh
Description: When the Pokemon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.

Name: As One
Description: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex's Unnerve Ability and Glastrier's Chilling Neigh Ability.

Name: As One
Description: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex's Unnerve Ability and Spectrier's Grim Neigh Ability.

Name: Lingering Aroma
Description: Contact with the Pokemon changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

Name: Seed Sower
Description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokemon is hit by an attack.

Name: Thermal Exchange
Description: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokemon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokemon also cannot be burned.

Name: Anger Shell
Description: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokemon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

Name: Purifying Salt
Description: The Pokemon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

Name: Well-Baked Body
Description: The Pokemon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

Name: Wind Rider
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokemon is hit by a wind move. The Pokemon also takes no damage from wind moves.

Name: Guard Dog
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokemon to switch out also fail to work.

Name: Rocky Payload
Description: Powers up Rock-type moves.

Name: Wind Power
Description: The Pokemon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokemon uses.

Name: Zero to Hero
Description: The Pokemon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.

Name: Commander
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokemon then issues commands from there.

Name: Electromorphosis
Description: The Pokemon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokemon uses.

Name: Protosynthesis
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokemon is holding Booster Energy.

Name: Quark Drive
Description: Boosts the Pokemon's most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokemon is holding Booster Energy.

Name: Good as Gold
Description: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokemon full immunity to other Pokemon's status moves.

Name: Vessel of Ruin
Description: The power of the Pokemon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokemon except itself.

Name: Sword of Ruin
Description: The power of the Pokemon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokemon except itself.

Name: Tablets of Ruin
Description: The power of the Pokemon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokemon except itself.

Name: Beads of Ruin
Description: The power of the Pokemon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokemon except itself.

Name: Orichalcum Pulse
Description: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokemon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokemon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

Name: Hadron Engine
Description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokemon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokemon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

Name: Opportunist
Description: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokemon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

Name: Cud Chew
Description: When the Pokemon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

Name: Sharpness
Description: Powers up slicing moves.

Name: Supreme Overlord
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

Name: Costar
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it copies an ally's stat changes.

Name: Toxic Debris
Description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokemon takes damage from physical moves.

Name: Armor Tail
Description: The mysterious tail covering the Pokemon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokemon or its allies.

Name: Earth Eater
Description: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokemon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

Name: Mycelium Might
Description: The Pokemon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

Name: Hospitality
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP.

Name: Mind's Eye
Description: The Pokemon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

Name: Embody Aspect
Description: The Pokemon's heart fills with memories, causing the Teal Mask to shine and the Pokemon's Speed stat to be boosted.

Name: Embody Aspect
Description: The Pokemon's heart fills with memories, causing the Hearthflame Mask to shine and the Pokemon's Attack stat to be boosted.

Name: Embody Aspect
Description: The Pokemon's heart fills with memories, causing the Wellspring Mask to shine and the Pokemon's Sp. Def stat to be boosted.

Name: Embody Aspect
Description: The Pokemon's heart fills with memories, causing the Cornerstone Mask to shine and the Pokemon's Defense stat to be boosted.

Name: Toxic Chain
Description: The power of the Pokemon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokemon hits with a move.

Name: Supersweet Syrup
Description: A sickly sweet scent spreads across the field the first time the Pokemon enters a battle, lowering the evasiveness of opposing Pokemon.

Name: Tera Shift
Description: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

Name: Tera Shell
Description: The Pokemon's shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokemon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

Name: Teraform Zero
Description: When Terapagos changes into its Stellar Form, it uses its hidden powers to eliminate all effects of weather and terrain, reducing them to zero.

Name: Poison Puppeteer
Description: Pokemon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
